title: aquilaria rostrata
intro: Aquilaria rostrata, also known as the African eaglewood or black stinkwood, is a tree species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Aquilaria rostrata lie in its ability to produce a resinous heartwood, which is highly valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. This plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions, due to its rich content of essential oils and terpenes. Aquilaria rostrata is used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, extracts, and traditional medicine, to treat a range of health issues, and is also valued for its fragrance and preservative properties.
